{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040729315EECBB1E71D07333B7"}"},"total":4035},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7353318676896547609","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"😭😭😭😭老师老师老师，可不可以写写狐妖小红娘的无暮篇（真的不长就小十二集，一集还是十几分钟，世界背景可以随便搜搜科普之类的！）啊，小无暮真的超级无敌意难平🥺他人设超好（😭他是真的非常天才，不止在他剑术上的天分，对人妖关系的理解也远超他的前辈们，并且和一群别人认为性格古怪的一些人也交得上朋友，十三四岁的崽崽也有自己的少年意气）就是命短，被他爹嫉妒而杀了，😭他死前说他好想再看看这个世界啊，想看看朋友们长大的样子，求求老师写写，老师真的文笔超棒，扶苏真的非常喜欢！！🥺"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712087339,"group_id":"7218172179282660389","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1005418145933884"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7218172179282660389","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"165"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17927,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7340241112142988057","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊啊啊，真的很喜欢扶苏那一篇，真的很遗憾历史上的扶苏就那么死了😭或许我有滤镜分，但是真的感觉不错，每个人物都有一个鲜明的形象🥺，角色（胡海胡亥）不为坏而坏，小扶苏真的很礼帽哈哈哈哈，这素我截止目前刷了一堆关于扶苏的，第二喜欢的一个篇目了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709035111,"group_id":"7218172179282660389","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"请叫咱真善美🐠🐠🐠","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzPXJ/xur6p7eGeDF1I+phMVNup/fD8kvNge4rGFmidg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e67e73ec8cf24f5a853ee1a506404637~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709796&x-signature=g6HQQ8c9xkGmhkgbQ6cMBnL5cY0%3D","user_id":"1005418145933884","user_name":"善良好公民"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1005418145933884","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7218172179282660389","book_info":{"abstract":"第四十五个世界 第二十个世界    三生-瑶光

第十八个世界   灵魂摆渡-越苏

第十三个故事    星汉灿烂——莲房

第十一个故事  如懿传——魏嬿婉
第十个故事    三生三世——天祁
第九个故事   清穿——胤礽
第八个故事   如懿传——富察琅嬅（都说甄嬛传的剧情多一些！！！）
第七个故事   知否——如兰

,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17300,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":16746},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7256287048348271412","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大写得非常好，我最喜欢的是男性视角的小世界，我仔细想了想，这是为何，可能是无cp专注事业的缘故，爱情很好，无私的亲情更令人羡慕且动容，于我而言，爱情不比亲情，个人不比家国，我为不可左右的血缘感到惊奇，这是人与人之间天然的纽带，顺着这个纽带不断发展，一系列不可割舍的感情随事迁。我格外喜欢人性的闪光，而作者大大您对此描写的格外绚烂且让人移不开眼，等待故事的心不断激荡，希望可以看到您以男性视角为主的故事，特此献上祝福。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689486082,"group_id":"7218172179282660389","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ZREoVgmOxi7WLQe1QTDosYgJUQCnbarnwJ/9mMEUjW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1706084579964008","user_name":"后患无穷的贾布"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1706084579964008","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7218172179282660389","book_info":{"abstract":"第四十五个世界 duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":51462,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16761},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7295094586401424154","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不扶贫的世界写的蛮好的，有的一谈恋爱就有一些违和感，男的有点油（个人感觉，就有种霸总出油了的感觉），可以挑着看不会有任何的影响，每个小世界都算是全新的。（建议挑着看👀）
搞事业的小世界挺好看的♥
主角嘛，挺善良的，有的时候我都感觉善良过头了，我看的时候感觉不够狠心，但是挺符合女主一开始的人设。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698525931,"group_id":"7218172179282660389","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手小白一枚，会努力更新码字的。纯属娱乐哈。
然后发现更爱看了，因为码字度日如年。
